# PromptInsights

> AI Conversation Research Platform by Cheil Germany — tracks how real humans interact with AI systems (ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) to find, evaluate, and choose brands. Helps companies optimize their visibility in AI-generated answers through data-driven GEO (Generative Engine Optimization).

PromptInsights is a research service, not a SaaS tool. It delivers structured reports and action roadmaps showing how AI systems represent your brand across customer journey stages.

## About

- [What is PromptInsights](https://www.cheil.de/solutions/promptinsights): Overview of the AI Conversation Research Platform
- [Contact / Request a Quote](https://www.cheil.de/solutions/promptinsights#contact): Get a research proposal

## Services

- Starter / Quick Scan: First AI visibility report for one product category and two AI platforms
- Standard / Full Research: Complete journey analysis across all four funnel stages and three AI platforms
- Enterprise / Continuous Monitoring: Quarterly research cycles with dedicated strategy consulting

## Key Concepts

- AI visibility = how prominently and accurately a brand appears in AI-generated answers
- Answer Type tracking: Monitors whether brand appears as a mention, recommendation, or direct answer
- GEO (Generative Engine Optimization): The discipline of optimizing content for AI answer engines, not just search engines
- Platforms tracked: ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Claude, Perplexity

## Optional

- [Cheil Germany](https://www.cheil.de): Parent company
